title: Mining Master Tweaks
body:
![logo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/844299726518091776/1070433300650414230/MMT.png)

This Resource pack changes some textures from the [Mining Master](https://modrinth.com/mod/mining-master) mod of which i don't have much of a fondness for.

THIS RESOURCE PACK REQUIRES MINING MASTER, WITHOUT IT, IT WONT WORK AT ALL!

![logo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/844299726518091776/1070434798415384586/permissionoknowcurseshutup.png)
